HYPNOSISCREATOR-COUNT.title: Count
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COUNT.description: Retain. Cost decreases by 1 at turn start. Playable when cost is 0.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SM.title: SM
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SM.description: When played on an opponent with the SM fetish, apply Doom based on their Max HP.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DOMSUB.title: DomSub
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DOMSUB.description: When played on an opponent with the DomSub fetish, apply Doom based on their Max HP.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL.title: Abnormal
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL.description: When played on an opponent with the Abnormal fetish, apply Doom based on their Max HP.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRANCE.title: Trance Fetish
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRANCE.description: Whenever Trance is applied to an opponent with the Trance fetish, apply Doom (5% of Max HP + 7, min 8; ×1.5 if they have Bog).
